subcodes.title: Words to E.J. Rosenberg et al, spoken around Feb. 1901
subcodes.first_line: In the Koran there is a verse which speaks of the 'lowest point of the low' as being the station of man. If we represent creation by a circle, at the top of it is God the creator
subcodes.subjects: @arcs of ascent and descent, @living waters; water of life, @spiritual transformation, @man's distinction from the animal
